result.content: FINAL_ANSWER: No JUSTIFICATION: The Compton frequency of a particle is determined by its rest mass (fC = mc2/h), whereas the Unruh frequency associated with cosmological acceleration a approx cH0 is determined by the Hubble scale (fU approx kB a / h approx kB cH0 / h). The Compton frequency of any known particle exceeds the Unruh frequency at cosmological acceleration by many orders of magnitude, making resonance impossible.
